title: diplotaxis erucoides subsp. longisiliqua
intro: Diplotaxis erucoides subsp. longisiliqua, also known as the wall rocket or wild rocket, is a plant species within the Brassicaceae family. It is a perennial herb that has been used for its medicinal and culinary properties. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing the risk of certain cancers and improving cardiovascular health. Diplotaxis erucoides subsp. longisiliqua can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, as well as being used as a culinary ingredient.
